ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand associated with the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_country" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of measurements */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_category_mapping_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retailers" (
  "retailer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retailer */,
  "retailer_name" TEXT /* Name of the retailer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the retailer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the retailer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the retailer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the retailer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retailer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_retailer_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "retailer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the retailer */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size available at the retailer */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the size at the retailer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_retailer_mapping_retailer_id FOREIGN KEY ("retailer_id") REFERENCES retailers ("retailer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_retailer_mapping_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (brand, retailer, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_brand_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_brand_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_brand_mapping_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)
